bead.title: operator-prompts: operatorPromptApprove/Cancel + per-project allowlist + auto-approve flag
bead.description: operatorPromptApprove and operatorPromptCancel mutations. Per-project allowlist (which identities can auto-approve). Auto-approve flag opt-in only for configured-localhost identity (NEVER blanket ts-net per locked decision). Manual approve = proposed → ready.
bead.acceptance: 1. Approve/cancel mutations exist. 2. Per-project allowlist enforced. 3. Auto-approve restricted to configured-localhost. 4. Tests cover happy + denied paths.
